description: Triggers for creating and maintaining design token systems, component specs, spacing/typography scales, and CSS variable frameworks

queries.query: Create design tokens for our color palette and semantic states
Build a design system with three-layer token architecture
Define CSS variables for our component library
Create a spacing scale for our design system
Define typography tokens for all heading levels and body text
Create component specifications for our button with all states
Set up Tailwind theme configuration from our design tokens
Generate a brand-compliant HTML slide template from our design tokens
Migrate our existing hardcoded styles to a CSS variable system
Define semantic color tokens for success, warning, error, and info states
Write a REST API endpoint in Node.js for user authentication
Summarize this YouTube video about product strategy
Transcribe the audio from our team meeting recording
Help me write a cover letter for a product manager role
Create a Kubernetes deployment config for my microservice
